headline: Is It Time To Reconsider Humana (HUM) After A 37% One Year Share Price Fall
summary: If you are wondering whether Humana at around US$166 per share still reflects its underlying business value, you are not alone. That is exactly the question this article tackles. The stock has returned 1.7% over the last 7 days, but is down 10.0% over 30 days and has recorded a 37.1% decline year to date and a 36.7% decline over the last year. These moves sit against a backdrop of ongoing attention on large managed care companies, including Humana, around how medical cost trends, pricing,...
